Kiswahili: Kilichoanza mwaka wa 2017 na tovuti mbili za mfano za uchunguzi kimepanuka na kuwa mtandao wa kitaifa wa tovuti 32 za uchunguzi katika kaunti 27 na sekta nyingi za Afya Moja.

English: Along the way, the country has strengthened laboratory systems, data management processes and workforce capacity, creating a robust platform for monitoring AMR.
Kiswahili: Wakati huo huo, nchi imeimarisha mifumo ya maabara, michakato ya usimamizi wa data na uwezo wa wafanyikazi, na kuunda jukwaa thabiti la ufuatiliaji wa AMR.

English: Kenya first submitted AMR data to GLASS in 2021 and transitioned to individual-level reporting in 2025.
Kiswahili: Kenya iliwasilisha data ya AMR kwa GLASS kwa mara ya kwanza mwaka wa 2021 na ikabadilika hadi kuripoti kiwango cha mtu binafsi mwaka wa 2025.

English: Through its Central Data Warehouse, the country now integrates AMR surveillance, antimicrobial use and antimicrobial consumption data, providing a more comprehensive picture of national AMR patterns.
Kiswahili: Kupitia Ghala lake Kuu la Data, nchi sasa inaunganisha ufuatiliaji wa AMR, matumizi ya dawa za kuua viini na data ya matumizi ya antimicrobial, ikitoa picha ya kina zaidi ya mifumo ya kitaifa ya AMR.

English: The country’s progress has been supported by strong governance structures, standardized data collection tools, laboratory information systems, regular data quality reviews and multidisciplinary collaboration involving laboratory, data and informatics teams.
Kiswahili: Maendeleo ya nchi yameungwa mkono na miundo thabiti ya utawala, zana sanifu za ukusanyaji wa takwimu, mifumo ya taarifa za maabara, ukaguzi wa mara kwa mara wa ubora wa data na ushirikiano wa fani mbalimbali unaohusisha timu za maabara, data na taarifa.

English: A phased approach allowed Kenya to strengthen systems and improve data quality before expanding surveillance.
Kiswahili: Mbinu ya hatua kwa hatua iliruhusu Kenya kuimarisha mifumo na kuboresha ubora wa data kabla ya kupanua ufuatiliaji.

English: Between 2021 and 2025, more than 100 000 AMR surveillance records were collected, with 9039 records submitted to GLASS in 2025.
Kiswahili: Kati ya 2021 na 2025, zaidi ya rekodi 100,000 za uchunguzi wa AMR zilikusanywa, na rekodi 9039 ziliwasilishwa kwa GLASS mnamo 2025.

English: The data generated are helping us better understand resistance trends and support evidence-based decision-making,” said Susan Githii, Country GLASS Focal Person and AMR Surveillance Focal Point, Kenya.
Kiswahili: Data inayotolewa inatusaidia kuelewa vyema mienendo ya upinzani na kuunga mkono uamuzi unaotegemea ushahidi,” alisema Susan Githii, Country GLASS Focal Person na AMR Surveillance Focal Point, Kenya.

English: Rwanda’s experience highlights the importance of collaboration in building stronger surveillance systems.
Kiswahili: Uzoefu wa Rwanda unaonyesha umuhimu wa ushirikiano katika kujenga mifumo imara ya ufuatiliaji.

English: Since enrolling in GLASS in 2022 and submitting its first AMR data in 2023, the country has worked closely with hospitals, national institutions and technical partners to strengthen data collection and reporting.
Kiswahili: Tangu kujiandikisha katika GLASS mwaka wa 2022 na kuwasilisha data yake ya kwanza ya AMR mnamo 2023, nchi imefanya kazi kwa karibu na hospitali, taasisi za kitaifa na washirika wa kiufundi ili kuimarisha ukusanyaji na kuripoti data.

English: During the 2025 GLASS reporting cycle, Rwanda began reporting both aggregate and individual-level data, ensuring continuity while transitioning to more detailed surveillance reporting.
Kiswahili: Wakati wa mzunguko wa kuripoti wa GLASS wa 2025, Rwanda ilianza kuripoti data ya jumla na ya kiwango cha mtu binafsi, kuhakikisha uendelevu wakati wa mpito kwa ripoti ya kina zaidi ya ufuatiliaji.

English: Data from four major referral hospitals – the University Teaching Hospital of Kigali, the University Teaching Hospital of Butare, King Faisal Hospital and Rwanda Military Hospital – are helping health authorities better understand how resistance is evolving.
Kiswahili: Data kutoka hospitali kuu nne za rufaa - Hospitali ya Kufundisha ya Chuo Kikuu cha Kigali, Hospitali ya Kufundisha ya Chuo Kikuu cha Butare, Hospitali ya King Faisal na Hospitali ya Kijeshi ya Rwanda - zinasaidia mamlaka za afya kuelewa vyema jinsi upinzani unavyoendelea.

English: The transition was supported by strong leadership from the Ministry of Health and the Rwanda Biomedical Centre, close collaboration among participating hospitals, the use of standardized tools such as BacLink and WHONET, and technical support from WHO Headquarters and the WHO Regional Office for Africa.
Kiswahili: Mpito huo uliungwa mkono na uongozi dhabiti kutoka Wizara ya Afya na Kituo cha Matibabu cha Rwanda, ushirikiano wa karibu kati ya hospitali zinazoshiriki, matumizi ya zana sanifu kama vile BacLink na WHONET, na usaidizi wa kiufundi kutoka Makao Makuu ya WHO na Ofisi ya Kanda ya WHO ya Afrika.

English: The experience has also highlighted the importance of collaboration in building a stronger surveillance system,” said Misbah Gashegu, National AMR Focal Person and Rwanda GLASS-AMR Focal Person.
Kiswahili: Uzoefu huo pia umeangazia umuhimu wa ushirikiano katika kujenga mfumo thabiti wa ufuatiliaji,” alisema Misbah Gashegu, Mhusika Mkuu wa Kitaifa wa AMR na Mhusika Mkuu wa Rwanda wa GLASS-AMR.

English: The transition to individual-level data reporting was not without challenges.
Kiswahili: Mpito kwa kuripoti data kwa kiwango cha mtu binafsi haukuwa na changamoto.

English: Kenya identified gaps related to laboratory information system interoperability, missing patient variables, workforce capacity for data validation and initial concerns around data privacy.
Kiswahili: Kenya ilitambua mapengo yanayohusiana na ushirikiano wa mfumo wa taarifa za maabara, vigezo vinavyokosekana kwa wagonjwa, uwezo wa wafanyakazi wa kuthibitisha data na masuala ya awali kuhusu faragha ya data.

English: Rwanda faced challenges related to manual data collection in some facilities, limited human resources for data management and a lack of interoperability among hospital information systems.
Kiswahili: Rwanda ilikabiliwa na changamoto zinazohusiana na ukusanyaji wa data kwa mikono katika baadhi ya vituo, rasilimali watu wachache kwa usimamizi wa data na ukosefu wa mwingiliano kati ya mifumo ya taarifa za hospitali.

English: Despite these obstacles, both countries demonstrated that progress is possible through structured planning, strong coordination, standardized tools, data quality assurance and sustained partner support.
Kiswahili: Licha ya vikwazo hivi, nchi zote mbili zilionyesha kuwa maendeleo yanawezekana kupitia mipango iliyopangwa, uratibu thabiti, zana sanifu, uhakikisho wa ubora wa data na usaidizi endelevu wa washirika.

English: To support countries in strengthening AMR surveillance and preparing data submissions to GLASS, the WHO Regional Office for Africa, in collaboration with the WHO Headquarters GLASS team, continues to provide technical guidance, capacity-building and opportunities for peer learning.
Kiswahili: Ili kusaidia nchi katika kuimarisha ufuatiliaji wa AMR na kuandaa mawasilisho ya data kwa GLASS, Ofisi ya WHO Kanda ya Afrika, kwa ushirikiano na timu ya GLASS ya Makao Makuu ya WHO, inaendelea kutoa mwongozo wa kiufundi, kujenga uwezo na fursa za kujifunza rika.

English: The experiences of Kenya and Rwanda demonstrate how better data can help countries stay ahead of one of the most significant public health threats of our time.
Kiswahili: Matukio ya Kenya na Rwanda yanaonyesha jinsi data bora inaweza kusaidia nchi kusalia mbele ya matishio makubwa zaidi ya afya ya umma katika wakati wetu.

English: In majorunimodalrainfall growing areas of Central, Rift Valley and Western provinces, where the rainy season spans from February to August, seasonal rains had a timely onset and have been characterized so far by exceptionally high amounts.
Kiswahili: Katika maeneo yanayokua kwa wingi katika majimbo ya Kati, Bonde la Ufa na Magharibi, ambapo msimu wa mvua huanza Februari hadi Agosti, mvua za msimu zilianza kwa wakati na zimeangaziwa hadi sasa kwa viwango vya juu vya kipekee.

English: The abundant rainfall amounts were overall beneficial for planting of 2026long‑rainsmain season cereal crops, to be harvested from October onwards.
Kiswahili: Kiasi kikubwa cha mvua kilikuwa na manufaa kwa jumla kwa kupanda mazao ya nafaka ya msimu wa masika wa 2026, ambayo yatavunwa kuanzia Oktoba na kuendelea.

English: However, excessively high rainfall amounts may also raise the risk of waterlogging and localized crop stress, potentially affecting early crop development in poorly drained areas.
Kiswahili: Hata hivyo, kiasi cha mvua nyingi kupita kiasi kinaweza pia kuongeza hatari ya kujaa maji na mkazo wa mimea iliyojanibishwa, ambayo inaweza kuathiri maendeleo ya mapema ya mazao katika maeneo yenye unyevu hafifu.

English: The ongoing conflict in the Middle East poses risks to the country’s agricultural sector by disrupting trade flows and supply chains and increasing input costs.
Kiswahili: Mzozo unaoendelea katika Mashariki ya Kati unaleta hatari kwa sekta ya kilimo nchini humo kwa kuvuruga mtiririko wa biashara na minyororo ya ugavi na kuongeza gharama za pembejeo.

English: Imports of fertilizers have already been delayed, affecting their timely application at the beginning of the 2026 cropping season, particularly in market‑oriented agricultural areas of western parts of the country.
Kiswahili: Uagizaji wa mbolea tayari umecheleweshwa, na hivyo kuathiri utumiaji wake kwa wakati mwanzoni mwa msimu wa mazao wa 2026, haswa katika maeneo ya kilimo yenye mwelekeo wa soko wa maeneo ya magharibi mwa nchi.

English: As a result, reduced application rates are expected to affect crop yields.
Kiswahili: Matokeo yake, viwango vilivyopunguzwa vya maombi vinatarajiwa kuathiri mavuno ya mazao.

English: A close monitoring of weather conditions is warranted.
Kiswahili: Ufuatiliaji wa karibu wa hali ya hewa unastahili.

English: As of end‑March, cumulative rainfall amounts were between three and four times the long-term average, supporting crop germination and early development, although excessive rainfall may also have caused localized disruptions in poorly drained areas.
Kiswahili: Kufikia mwishoni mwa Machi, kiasi cha mvua kiliongezeka kati ya mara tatu na nne ya wastani wa muda mrefu, kusaidia kuota kwa mazao na maendeleo ya mapema, ingawa mvua nyingi zinaweza pia kusababisha usumbufu wa kienyeji katika maeneo yenye maji duni.

English: Crops in these areas are harvested in July and August, and compared to westernunimodalhigh potential areas, agricultural systems are less input intensive.
Kiswahili: Mazao katika maeneo haya huvunwa mnamo Julai na Agosti, na ikilinganishwa na maeneo yenye uwezekano wa westernunimodalhigh, mifumo ya kilimo haihitaji pembejeo nyingi.

English: As a result, a forecast of below‑average rains from June onwards and ongoing fertilizer supply constraints are expected to have a limited impact on yields, and early production prospects are comparatively more favourable than in western high‑potential areas.
Kiswahili: Kwa hivyo, utabiri wa mvua za chini ya wastani kuanzia Juni na kuendelea na vikwazo vinavyoendelea vya usambazaji wa mbolea vinatarajiwa kuwa na athari ndogo kwa mavuno, na matarajio ya uzalishaji wa mapema ni mazuri kwa kulinganisha kuliko maeneo ya magharibi yenye uwezekano mkubwa.

English: However, cereal production from these areas accounts for only a small share of the national output.
Kiswahili: Hata hivyo, uzalishaji wa nafaka kutoka maeneo haya unachangia sehemu ndogo tu ya pato la taifa.

English: However, in northeastern and some eastern areas (Mandera, Wajir, Garissa and Tana River counties) pasture conditions in March remained below‑average following a severe drought in late 2025 (Vegetation Condition Index map).
Kiswahili: Hata hivyo, katika maeneo ya kaskazini-mashariki na baadhi ya mashariki (kaunti za Mandera, Wajir, Garissa na Tana River) hali ya malisho mnamo Machi ilisalia chini- wastani kufuatia ukame mkali mwishoni mwa 2025 (ramani ya Kielezo cha Hali ya Uoto).

English: By contrast, in the drought-affected counties, body conditions were assessed to be poor in Mandera County and from poor to fair in Wajir, Garissa and Tana River counties, although above‑average seasonal rains are supporting pasture and fodder regeneration, contributing to gradual improvements.
Kiswahili: Kinyume chake, katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na ukame, hali ya mwili ilitathminiwa kuwa mbaya katika Kaunti ya Mandera na kutoka hali duni hadi ya haki katika kaunti za Wajir, Garissa na Tana River, ingawa mvua za msimu wa juu-wastani zinasaidia ufufuaji wa malisho na malisho, na kuchangia uboreshaji wa taratibu.

English: In pastoral areas, livestock prices generally declined between late 2025 and early 2026 as animal body conditions deteriorated.
Kiswahili: Katika maeneo ya wafugaji, bei ya mifugo kwa ujumla ilipungua kati ya mwishoni mwa 2025 na mapema 2026 huku hali ya miili ya wanyama ikizidi kuwa mbaya.

English: By contrast, in drought-affected northeastern areas, prices decreased more sharply reflecting the substantial deterioration of animal body condition.
Kiswahili: Kinyume chake, katika maeneo ya kaskazini-mashariki yaliyoathiriwa na ukame, bei ilipungua kwa kasi zaidi ikionyesha kuzorota kwa hali ya mwili wa wanyama.

English: With maize prices rising by an average of 7 percent across all pastoral areas, livestock‑to‑cereal terms of trade for pastoralists showed only marginal year-on-year declines in northwestern areas, while they sharply deteriorated in northeastern areas.
Kiswahili: Huku bei ya mahindi ikipanda kwa wastani wa asilimia 7 katika maeneo yote ya wafugaji, masharti ya biashara ya mifugo hadi nafaka kwa wafugaji yalionyesha kupungua kidogo tu mwaka baada ya mwaka katika maeneo ya kaskazini-magharibi, wakati yalipungua kwa kasi katika maeneo ya kaskazini mashariki.

English: The high levels and prevalence of food insecurity are mainly due to the poor performance of the 2025 October‑Decembershort‑rains,which severely affected crops and livestock.
Kiswahili: Viwango vya juu na kuenea kwa uhaba wa chakula kunatokana zaidi na utendaji duni wa mvua za 2025 Oktoba-Desemba 2025, ambazo ziliathiri vibaya mazao na mifugo.

English: Households in drought‑affected Wajir, Mandera and Tana River counties are of particular concern.
Kiswahili: Kaya katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na ukame za Wajir, Mandera na Tana River zina wasiwasi mkubwa.

English: In these areas, the highest prevalence of food insecurity is reported, with 40 to 60 percent of the population estimated to face severe acute food insecurity (IPC Phase 3 [Crisis] or worse).
Kiswahili: Katika maeneo haya, kiwango kikubwa zaidi cha uhaba wa chakula kinaripotiwa, huku asilimia 40 hadi 60 ya watu wakikadiriwa kukabiliwa na uhaba mkubwa wa chakula (IPC Awamu ya 3 [Mgogoro] au mbaya zaidi).

English: These three counties also account for about 65 percent of the total number of people estimated in IPC Phase 4 (Emergency).
Kiswahili: Kaunti hizi tatu pia zinachukua takriban asilimia 65 ya jumla ya idadi ya watu wanaokadiriwa katika IPC Awamu ya 4 (Dharura).

English: The new Strategy, developed with technical support from the United Nations Office for Disaster Risk Reduction (UNDRR), provides a comprehensive framework to strengthen financial resilience through a shift from reactive, crisis-driven financing to proactive, risk-informed financial preparedness through 2030.
Kiswahili: Mkakati huo mpya, uliotayarishwa kwa msaada wa kiufundi kutoka Ofisi ya Umoja wa Mataifa ya Kupunguza Hatari za Maafa (UNDRR), unatoa mfumo mpana wa kuimarisha ustahimilivu wa kifedha kupitia kuhama kutoka kwa ufadhili tendaji, unaotokana na shida hadi utayarishaji wa kifedha unaozingatia hatari hadi 2030.

English: The central objective of the strategy is to enhance the financial capacity of national and county governments to effectively manage disaster risks along the disaster risk management (DRM) continuum.
Kiswahili: Lengo kuu la mkakati huo ni kuimarisha uwezo wa kifedha wa serikali za kitaifa na kaunti ili kudhibiti ipasavyo hatari za maafa katika mwendelezo wa usimamizi wa hatari za maafa (DRM).

English: Kenya’s leadership in disaster risk reduction comes at a time when the country faces increasing climate-related challenges.
Kiswahili: Uongozi wa Kenya katika kupunguza hatari ya majanga unakuja wakati nchi hiyo inakabiliwa na changamoto zinazoongezeka zinazohusiana na hali ya hewa.

English: Over recent decades, droughts and floods have severely impacted communities, particularly in the Arid and Semi-Arid Lands (ASAL) regions.
Kiswahili: Katika miongo ya hivi majuzi, ukame na mafuriko yameathiri sana jamii, hasa katika maeneo ya Ardhi Kame na Nusu Kame (ASAL).

English: In 2024, the March–April–May floods affected around 410,000 people, claimed 315 lives, and caused damage amounting to 187 billion Kenyan Shillings¹.
Kiswahili: Mnamo 2024, mafuriko ya Machi-Aprili-Mei yaliathiri takriban watu 410,000, na kupoteza maisha ya 315, na kusababisha uharibifu wa Shilingi bilioni 187 za Kenya¹.

English: Building on lessons from the DRF Strategy 2018–2022, this updated Strategy expands beyond risk retention and risk transfer to incorporate investments for risk reduction.
Kiswahili: Kwa kuzingatia mafunzo kutoka kwa Mkakati wa DRF 2018–2022, Mkakati huu uliosasishwa unapanuka zaidi ya uhifadhi wa hatari na uhamishaji wa hatari ili kujumuisha uwekezaji wa kupunguza hatari.

English: It is cross-cutting in nature, designed to be multi-hazard and multi-sector, and encompasses gender equality and social inclusion.
Kiswahili: Ni mtambuka kimaumbile, iliyoundwa kuwa ya hatari nyingi na sekta nyingi, na inajumuisha usawa wa kijinsia na ushirikishwaji wa kijamii.

English: The Strategy complements the Disaster Risk Management Strategy 2025–2030, which established a long-term framework for reducing disaster risks and strengthening resilience across Kenya.
Kiswahili: Mkakati huu unakamilisha Mkakati wa Kudhibiti Hatari za Maafa 2025–2030, ambao ulianzisha mfumo wa muda mrefu wa kupunguza hatari za maafa na kuimarisha ustahimilivu kote nchini Kenya.

English: UNDRR also supported the National Treasury in developing adisaster risk reduction and climate change adaptation budget tagging (DCBT)system, which helped Kenya strengthen its ability to track and allocate resources for resilience.
Kiswahili: UNDRR pia iliunga mkono Hazina ya Kitaifa katika kuandaa mfumo wa kupunguza hatari ya maafa na mfumo wa kuweka alama za bajeti ya kukabiliana na mabadiliko ya tabianchi (DCBT), ambao ulisaidia Kenya kuimarisha uwezo wake wa kufuatilia na kutenga rasilimali kwa ajili ya kustahimili.

English: At every stage of the Strategy’s development, an Inter-Agency Taskforce reviewed progress and guided revisions.
Kiswahili: Katika kila hatua ya uundaji wa Mkakati, Kikosi Kazi cha Mashirika ya Kimataifa kilikagua maendeleo na marekebisho yaliyoongozwa.

English: Targeted consultations with civil society organizations, non-governmental organizations, construction practitioners, the private sector, and development partners have ensured that the strategy reflects broad stakeholder consensus.
Kiswahili: Mashauriano yaliyolengwa na mashirika ya kiraia, mashirika yasiyo ya kiserikali, watendaji wa ujenzi, sekta binafsi, na washirika wa maendeleo yamehakikisha kuwa mkakati huo unaonyesha maelewano mapana ya wadau.

English: The Strategy was developed through a phased, consultative process from 2025 to 2026.
Kiswahili: Mkakati huu uliandaliwa kupitia mchakato wa mashauriano wa hatua kwa hatua kutoka 2025 hadi 2026.

English: It involved collaborating with multiple partner organisations, with support provided by UNDRR.
Kiswahili: Ilihusisha kushirikiana na mashirika mengi ya washirika, kwa usaidizi uliotolewa na UNDRR.

English: Other partners involved were the European Union (EU), the United Kingdom Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office, and the Government of Italy, in addition to long-standing support from the World Bank Group and the World Food Programme (WFP).
Kiswahili: Washirika wengine waliohusika ni Umoja wa Ulaya (EU), Ofisi ya Mambo ya Nje ya Uingereza, Jumuiya ya Madola na Maendeleo, na Serikali ya Italia, pamoja na msaada wa muda mrefu kutoka Kundi la Benki ya Dunia na Mpango wa Chakula Duniani (WFP).

English: Looking ahead, UNDRR plans to offer continued support to Kenya’s institutional DRM capacity, including by advancing its cost–benefit analysis of DRR investments.
Kiswahili: Tukiangalia mbeleni, UNDRR inapanga kuendelea kutoa usaidizi kwa uwezo wa kitaasisi wa DRM wa Kenya, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuendeleza uchanganuzi wake wa gharama-manufaa ya uwekezaji wa DRR.

English: This work will ensure that future investments are evidence-based, economically sound, and aligned with national priorities.
Kiswahili: Kazi hii itahakikisha kuwa uwekezaji wa siku zijazo ni wa msingi wa ushahidi, mzuri kiuchumi, na unaendana na vipaumbele vya kitaifa.

English: Good financing decisions depend on good information, on understanding where risks lie, how they evolve, and what they will cost,” said Amjad Abbashar, Chief, UNDRR Regional Office for Africa.
Kiswahili: Maamuzi mazuri ya ufadhili yanategemea taarifa nzuri, kuelewa mahali ambapo hatari zipo, jinsi zinavyobadilika, na zitagharimu nini,” alisema Amjad Abbashar, Mkuu wa Ofisi ya UNDRR ya Kanda ya Afrika.

English: The Act provides a legal foundation for disaster governance in Kenya.
Kiswahili: Sheria inatoa msingi wa kisheria wa udhibiti wa majanga nchini Kenya.

English: It establishes the National Disaster Risk Management Authority and County Disaster Risk Management Committees, tasked with coordinating response, issuing early warnings, and ensuring that resources reach affected communities in a timely manner.
Kiswahili: Inaanzisha Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Kudhibiti Hatari ya Maafa na Kamati za Kudhibiti Hatari za Majanga za Kaunti, zilizopewa jukumu la kuratibu majibu, kutoa maonyo ya mapema, na kuhakikisha kuwa rasilimali zinafikia jamii zilizoathiriwa kwa wakati ufaao.

English: Further strengthening the fiscal systems in Kenya, the Division of Revenue Act, 2026. defines how resources are shared between national and county governments and enables counties to finance critical services, including DRM.
Kiswahili: Kuimarisha zaidi mifumo ya kifedha nchini Kenya, Sheria ya Mgawanyo wa Mapato, 2026. inafafanua jinsi rasilimali zinavyogawanywa kati ya serikali za kitaifa na kaunti na kuwezesha kaunti kufadhili huduma muhimu, pamoja na DRM.

English: The launch of the Strategy, alongside these legislative achievements, reflects Kenya’s strong national commitment to resilience, fiscal stability, and inclusive protection for all residents.
Kiswahili: Kuzinduliwa kwa Mkakati huo, pamoja na mafanikio haya ya kisheria, kunaonyesha dhamira dhabiti ya kitaifa ya Kenya ya uthabiti, uthabiti wa kifedha, na ulinzi jumuishi kwa wakaazi wote.

English: It also positions the country as a leader in advancing innovative approaches to disaster risk management in Africa, ensuring that individuals and institutions are empowered to anticipate and respond to disasters before they occur.
Kiswahili: Pia inaiweka nchi kama kiongozi katika kuendeleza mbinu bunifu za udhibiti wa hatari za maafa barani Afrika, kuhakikisha kuwa watu binafsi na taasisi wanawezeshwa kutarajia na kukabiliana na majanga kabla hayajatokea.

English: The analysis is based on information available as of April 30, 2026.
Kiswahili: Uchambuzi huo unatokana na taarifa inayopatikana kuanzia tarehe 30 Aprili 2026.

English: Between 2020 and 2024, Tana River County experienced alternating cycles of drought and flooding, exacerbating displacement patterns.
Kiswahili: Kati ya 2020 na 2024, Kaunti ya Tana River ilikumbwa na mizunguko ya ukame na mafuriko, na hivyo kuzidisha mwelekeo wa watu kuhama makazi yao.

English: Prolonged dry spells between 2020 and 2023 affected crop yields, caused livestock deaths and heightened food insecurity, forcing many households relying on traditional livelihoods to resort to distress migration.
Kiswahili: Muda mrefu wa kiangazi kati ya 2020 na 2023 uliathiri mavuno ya mazao, ulisababisha vifo vya mifugo na kuongezeka kwa uhaba wa chakula, na kulazimisha kaya nyingi zinazotegemea maisha ya jadi kuhamia uhamiaji wa shida.

English: In spring 2024, the county was among the worst affected by El Niño-induced floods, which submerged entire villages, damaging facilities, destroying farmlands and displacing thousands in the process.
Kiswahili: Mnamo majira ya kuchipua 2024, kaunti ilikuwa miongoni mwa nchi zilizoathiriwa zaidi na mafuriko yaliyosababishwa na El Niño, ambayo yalizamisha vijiji vizima, kuharibu vifaa, kuharibu mashamba na kuwahamisha maelfu ya watu katika mchakato huo.

English: This underscores the severity of recurrent climate shocks, particularly flooding along the Tana River Basin, which continues to uproot families, disrupt livelihoods and strain host communities.
Kiswahili: Hii inasisitiza ukali wa majanga ya hali ya hewa yanayotokea mara kwa mara, hasa mafuriko kwenye Bonde la Mto Tana, ambayo yanaendelea kung'oa familia, kutatiza maisha na kuzorotesha jamii zinazowapokea.

English: The Solutions and Mobility Index (SMI) for Tana River County aims to assess progress toward durable solutions for displaced populations (IDPs and IDP returnees).
Kiswahili: Kielezo cha Suluhu na Uhamaji (SMI) cha Kaunti ya Tana River kinalenga kutathmini maendeleo kuelekea suluhu za kudumu kwa watu waliohamishwa makazi yao (IDPs na wanaorejea IDP).

English: Displacement in the county is complex, influenced by natural hazards such as drought or floods, insecurity and resource scarcity.
Kiswahili: Uhamisho wa watu katika kaunti ni changamani, unachangiwa na hatari za asili kama vile ukame au mafuriko, ukosefu wa usalama na uhaba wa rasilimali.

English: By analyzing access to essential services, livelihoods and social cohesion, the SMI identifies gaps in recovery efforts and informs targeted interventions.
Kiswahili: Kwa kuchanganua ufikiaji wa huduma muhimu, riziki na uwiano wa kijamii, SMI inatambua mapungufu katika juhudi za kurejesha na kuarifu afua zinazolengwa.

English: SMI indicators align with the Inter-Agency Standing Committee’s (IASC) Framework for Durable Solutions and integrates data from IOM’s Displacement Tracking Matrix (DTM) to ensure a comprehensive, evidence-based approach.
Kiswahili: Viashiria vya SMI vinapatana na Mfumo wa Kamati ya Kudumu ya Wakala wa Kimataifa (IASC) kwa Suluhisho la Kudumu na kuunganisha data kutoka kwa Mfumo wa Ufuatiliaji wa Uhamisho wa IOM (DTM) ili kuhakikisha mbinu ya kina, inayotegemea ushahidi.

English: Despite recent rainfall, the drought and food‑security crisis in Kenya remains severe and life‑threatening.
Kiswahili: Licha ya mvua za hivi majuzi, ukame na mzozo wa usalama wa chakula nchini Kenya bado ni mkubwa na unaotishia maisha.

English: Over three million people are still facing Crisis or Emergency levels of hunger, malnutrition rates remain critically high among children and pregnant and lactating women, and fragile livelihoods have not recovered.
Kiswahili: Zaidi ya watu milioni tatu bado wanakabiliwa na Mgogoro au viwango vya Dharura vya njaa, viwango vya utapiamlo vimesalia kuwa juu sana miongoni mwa watoto na wanawake wajawazito na wanaonyonyesha, na maisha duni hayajapona.

English: Seasonal gains in water and pasture are uneven and short‑lived, while depleted herds, high food prices, and reduced assistance continue to push vulnerable households toward irreversible losses.
Kiswahili: Mafanikio ya msimu katika maji na malisho hayalingani na yanadumu kwa muda mfupi, huku mifugo iliyopungua, bei ya juu ya chakula, na usaidizi uliopunguzwa ukiendelea kusukuma kaya zilizo hatarini kwenye hasara isiyoweza kurekebishwa.

English: Yet this Emergency Appeal is only 9 per cent funded at a time when needs are rising, not receding.
Kiswahili: Bado Rufaa hii ya Dharura inafadhiliwa kwa asilimia 9 pekee wakati ambapo mahitaji yanaongezeka, wala hayapungui.

English: Without urgent additional funding, KRCS and partners will be forced to limit coverage, shorten assistance cycles, and leave high‑risk communities without lifesaving food, water, nutrition, and health support.
Kiswahili: Bila ufadhili wa haraka wa ziada, KRCS na washirika watalazimika kuweka kikomo cha malipo, kufupisha mizunguko ya usaidizi, na kuacha jumuiya zenye hatari kubwa bila usaidizi wa kuokoa maisha wa chakula, maji, lishe na afya.

English: Timely donor investment now can prevent further deterioration, protect livelihoods, and save lives reducing the far higher costs of emergency escalation later in the year if action is delayed.
Kiswahili: Uwekezaji wa wafadhili kwa wakati unaofaa sasa unaweza kuzuia kuzorota zaidi, kulinda maisha, na kuokoa maisha kwa kupunguza gharama kubwa zaidi za ongezeko la dharura baadaye mwakani ikiwa hatua itachelewa.

English: Primary HIV prevention programmes are vital for reducing new HIV infections and saving domestic resources which otherwise would be expended on treatment and support services if HIV transmission is not curbed.
Kiswahili: Mipango ya kimsingi ya kuzuia VVU ni muhimu katika kupunguza maambukizi mapya ya VVU na kuokoa rasilimali za nyumbani ambazo zingetumika katika matibabu na huduma za usaidizi ikiwa maambukizi ya VVU hayatazuiliwa.

English: About half of all new HIV infections worldwide in 2024 occurred among people from key populations and their sex partners, including gay men and other men who have sex with men, sex workers, transgender people and people who inject drugs.
Kiswahili: Takriban nusu ya maambukizo mapya ya VVU duniani kote mwaka 2024 yalitokea miongoni mwa watu kutoka makundi muhimu na wapenzi wao wa ngono, wakiwemo mashoga na wanaume wengine wanaofanya ngono na wanaume, wafanyabiashara ya ngono, watu waliobadili jinsia na watu wanaojidunga dawa za kulevya.

English: In most countries, these key populations face stigma and discrimination in public health settings, which impair their access to and use of HIV and other health services.
Kiswahili: Katika nchi nyingi, watu hawa wakuu wanakabiliwa na unyanyapaa na ubaguzi katika mazingira ya afya ya umma, ambayo inadhoofisha upatikanaji na matumizi yao ya VVU na huduma nyingine za afya.

English: UNAIDS and the World Health Organization therefore continue to advocate for differentiated service delivery models for people from key populations, including through community-led services.
Kiswahili: UNAIDS na Shirika la Afya Duniani kwa hiyo wanaendelea kutetea mifumo tofauti ya utoaji huduma kwa watu kutoka makundi muhimu, ikiwa ni pamoja na kupitia huduma zinazoongozwa na jamii.

English: The 2021 Political Declaration on HIV and AIDS specified that community-led organizations should be delivering 80% of HIV prevention services for populations at high risk of HIV infection by 2025.
Kiswahili: Azimio la Kisiasa la 2021 kuhusu VVU na UKIMWI lilibainisha kuwa mashirika yanayoongozwa na jamii yanapaswa kuwa yanatoa 80% ya huduma za kuzuia VVU kwa watu walio katika hatari kubwa ya kuambukizwa VVU ifikapo 2025.

English: Despite many challenges, some countries have adopted HIV service delivery models for people from key populations that are entirely or partly financed domestically and that could be sustainable at scale.
Kiswahili: Licha ya changamoto nyingi, baadhi ya nchi zimetumia modeli za utoaji wa huduma za VVU kwa watu kutoka makundi muhimu ambayo yanafadhiliwa kwa kiasi kikubwa au kwa kiasi ndani na ambayo inaweza kuwa endelevu kwa kiwango kikubwa.

English: Civil society organizations are vital for these models, yet much of their work is unrecognized and underfunded.
Kiswahili: Mashirika ya kiraia ni muhimu kwa mifano hii, lakini kazi zao nyingi hazitambuliki na hazina ufadhili wa kutosha.

English: It includes real-world examples from different contexts that can guide efforts to enhance HIV prevention for people from key populations.
Kiswahili: Inajumuisha mifano ya ulimwengu halisi kutoka katika mazingira tofauti ambayo inaweza kuongoza juhudi za kuimarisha uzuiaji wa VVU kwa watu kutoka makundi muhimu.

English: It includes two subtypes, each using a different funding mechanism.
Kiswahili: Inajumuisha aina mbili ndogo, kila moja ikitumia utaratibu tofauti wa ufadhili.

English: Model 2(a) uses a tendering process for service providers such as civil society organizations (e.g. in the Republic of Moldova), or grants to provincial and municipal governments.
Kiswahili: Mfano wa 2(a) hutumia mchakato wa kutoa zabuni kwa watoa huduma kama vile mashirika ya kiraia (k.m. katika Jamhuri ya Moldova), au ruzuku kwa serikali za mikoa na manispaa.

English: In Model 2(b), services delivered by public primary healthcare entities and civil society organizations s are reimbursed (e.g. in the Philippines and Thailand).
Kiswahili: Katika Mfano wa 2(b), huduma zinazotolewa na mashirika ya afya ya msingi ya umma na mashirika ya kiraia hulipwa (k.m. Ufilipino na Thailand).

English: Date of event15-11-2025What happened, where and when?
Kiswahili: Tarehe ya tukio15-11-2025Nini kilitokea, wapi na lini?

English: This marked the first recorded occurrence of MVD in the country.
Kiswahili: Hili lilikuwa tukio la kwanza kurekodiwa la MVD nchini.

English: Genetic analysis conducted by EPHI indicated that the virus strain was consistent with those reported in recent outbreaks in other countries within the East African region.
Kiswahili: Uchambuzi wa kinasaba uliofanywa na EPHI ulionyesha kuwa aina ya virusi hivyo ilikuwa sawa na ile iliyoripotiwa katika milipuko ya hivi majuzi katika mataifa mengine ndani ya ukanda wa Afrika Mashariki.

English: A total of nine cases had been reported at the time.
Kiswahili: Jumla ya kesi tisa zilikuwa zimeripotiwa wakati huo.

English: Jinka Town was located approximately 170 km and 203 km from the Kenya–Ethiopia border points of Kibish and Todonyang, respectively (both in Turkana County), and approximately 230 km from Ileret and 465 km from Moyale Town (both in Marsabit County).
Kiswahili: Mji wa Jinka ulipatikana takriban kilomita 170 na kilomita 203 kutoka maeneo ya mpaka ya Kenya-Ethiopia ya Kibish na Todonyang, mtawalia (zote katika Kaunti ya Turkana), na takriban kilomita 230 kutoka Ileret na kilomita 465 kutoka Mji wa Moyale (zote katika Kaunti ya Marsabit).

English: Turkana and Marsabit counties were identified as being at high risk due to their shared border with Ethiopia.
Kiswahili: Kaunti za Turkana na Marsabit zilitambuliwa kuwa katika hatari kubwa kutokana na mpaka wao wa pamoja na Ethiopia.

English: These areas, along with surrounding regions, have numerous informal and non-designated border crossing points that were not monitored by security or health officials.
Kiswahili: Maeneo haya, pamoja na mikoa ya jirani, yana vituo vingi vya kuvuka mipaka visivyo rasmi na visivyopangwa ambavyo havikusimamiwa na maafisa wa usalama au afya.

English: The geographical proximity of these entry points underscored the heightened risk of cross-border transmission driven by frequent social and economic interactions.
Kiswahili: Ukaribu wa kijiografia wa sehemu hizi za kuingilia ulisisitiza hatari kubwa ya maambukizi ya kuvuka mipaka inayoendeshwa na mwingiliano wa mara kwa mara wa kijamii na kiuchumi.

English: In addition, frequent travel between Addis Ababa Bole International Airport and Jomo Kenyatta International Airport increased the vulnerability of Nairobi, the capital city.
Kiswahili: Aidha, kusafiri mara kwa mara kati ya Uwanja wa Ndege wa Kimataifa wa Addis Ababa Bole na Uwanja wa Ndege wa Kimataifa wa Jomo Kenyatta kuliongeza hatari ya kuathirika kwa Nairobi, jiji kuu la Nairobi.

English: This situation necessitated the implementation of immediate preparedness and readiness measures to mitigate the risk of importation and potential spread of Marburg virus disease in Kenya.
Kiswahili: Hali hii ililazimu kutekelezwa kwa utayari wa haraka na hatua za kujitayarisha ili kupunguza hatari ya kuagiza na kuenea kwa ugonjwa wa virusi vya Marburg nchini Kenya.

English: Rainfall levels reached unprecedented highs, with 160 mm recorded at the Wilson Airport meteorological station, 145 mm at Moi Air Base, 112 mm in Dagoretti, and 117 mm at the Kabete station, all within a span of 3 to 5 hours.
Kiswahili: Viwango vya mvua vilifikia viwango vya juu ambavyo havijawahi kushuhudiwa, huku milimita 160 ilirekodiwa katika kituo cha hali ya hewa cha Uwanja wa Ndege wa Wilson, milimita 145 katika Kambi ya Hewa ya Moi, milimita 112 huko Dagoretti, na milimita 117 katika kituo cha Kabete, yote ndani ya muda wa saa 3 hadi 5.

English: The capital city had just experienced over 534mm of rainfall.
Kiswahili: Mji mkuu ulikuwa umepitia mvua ya zaidi ya 534mm.

English: The heavy rains swept away bridges, destroyed homes, and rendered major roads impassable, leaving hundreds of residents displaced.
Kiswahili: Mvua hiyo kubwa ilisomba madaraja, kuharibu nyumba, na kufanya barabara kuu kutopitika, na kuwaacha mamia ya wakaazi kukosa makazi.

English: The combination of loss of life, widespread property damage, and significant disruption to critical infrastructure further compounded the crisis.
Kiswahili: Mchanganyiko wa upotezaji wa maisha, uharibifu mkubwa wa mali, na usumbufu mkubwa wa miundombinu muhimu ulizidisha shida.

English: Nationwide, 53 people lost their lives, including 27 fatalities in Nairobi in a single night.
Kiswahili: Nchini kote, watu 53 walipoteza maisha, ikiwa ni pamoja na vifo 27 jijini Nairobi katika usiku mmoja.

English: Kenya is facing a complex humanitarian crisis driven by recurrent drought, flooding, disease outbreaks, displacement, refugee inflows, climate shocks, and localized conflict, with the most severe impacts in the arid and semi-arid lands (ASALs).Flood-prone and refugee-hosting areas remain under sustained pressure.
Kiswahili: Kenya inakabiliwa na janga kubwa la kibinadamu linalochochewa na ukame wa mara kwa mara, mafuriko, milipuko ya magonjwa, kufurushwa, kuingia kwa wakimbizi, majanga ya hali ya hewa, na migogoro ya kienyeji, yenye athari kubwa zaidi katika maeneo kame na nusu kame (ASALs).

English: The situation worsened after one of the driest October–December rainy seasons on record in 2025, less than three years after the 2020–2022 drought.
Kiswahili: Hali ilizidi kuwa mbaya baada ya mojawapo ya misimu yenye ukame zaidi ya Oktoba-Desemba katika rekodi ya 2025, chini ya miaka mitatu baada ya ukame wa 2020-2022.

English: The failure of the short rains, combined with reduced assistance, constrained livelihoods, reliance on expensive markets, has significantly deteriorated food security across ASAL counties.
Kiswahili: Kushindwa kwa mvua fupi, pamoja na usaidizi uliopunguzwa, maisha duni, kutegemea masoko ya bei ghali, kumezorotesha sana usalama wa chakula katika kaunti zote za ASAL.

English: Despite localized improvements following the March–May rains, drought remains acute in northern counties such as Mandera and Wajir.
Kiswahili: Licha ya uboreshaji wa ndani kufuatia mvua ya Machi-Mei, ukame unaendelea kuwa mkali katika kaunti za kaskazini kama vile Mandera na Wajir.

English: Since late February, flooding has affected over 40,000 people, caused 122 fatalities and displaced more than 28,000.
Kiswahili: Tangu mwishoni mwa Februari, mafuriko yameathiri zaidi ya watu 40,000, na kusababisha vifo vya 122 na zaidi ya 28,000 kukimbia makazi.

English: Concurrent outbreaks of cholera, measles (over 300 cases), dengue and Mpox are increasing public health risks.While no Ebola cases have been reported, Kenya remains at high risk, with preparedness led by the Kenya National Public Health Institute.
Kiswahili: Milipuko ya wakati mmoja ya kipindupindu, surua (zaidi ya visa 300), dengue na Mpox yanaongeza hatari za afya ya umma. Ingawa hakuna kisa chochote cha Ebola ambacho kimeripotiwa, Kenya bado iko katika hatari kubwa, huku kujiandaa kukiongozwa na Taasisi ya Kitaifa ya Afya ya Umma ya Kenya.

English: Humanitarian partners continue to respond.From January to April, partners admitted over 44,000 children for treatment of severe acute malnutrition and screened more than 270,000 children and 74,000 pregnant and nursing women in seven counties.
Kiswahili: Washirika wa misaada ya kibinadamu wanaendelea kujibu. Kuanzia Januari hadi Aprili, washirika walilaza zaidi ya watoto 44,000 kwa matibabu ya utapiamlo mkali na kuwapima zaidi ya watoto 270,000 na wanawake wajawazito na wanaonyonyesha 74,000 katika kaunti saba.

English: Amid a high cross-border risk from the ongoing Ebola Bundibugyo virus disease outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda, the Government, with support from UN agencies and partners, has initiated preparedness measures.
Kiswahili: Huku kukiwa na hatari kubwa ya kuvuka mpaka kutokana na mlipuko wa ugonjwa wa Ebola Bundibugyo unaoendelea katika Jamhuri ya Kidemokrasia ya Kongo na Uganda, Serikali, kwa msaada wa mashirika ya Umoja wa Mataifa na washirika, imeanzisha hatua za kujitayarisha.

English: Rainfall will vary across Kenya, with lower amounts in western regions and the Rift Valley, higher rainfall at the Coast, and minimal rain in eastern and north-eastern areas, while temperatures will remain above average nationwide.
Kiswahili: Mvua zitatofautiana kote nchini Kenya, na kiasi cha chini katika mikoa ya magharibi na Bonde la Ufa, mvua nyingi zaidi Pwani, na mvua kidogo katika maeneo ya mashariki na kaskazini-mashariki, huku halijoto ikisalia kuwa juu ya wastani nchini kote.

English: While floods in parts of Kenya demand urgent response, drought affected communities are facing a quieter emergency that unfolds over months rather than days.
Kiswahili: Huku mafuriko katika baadhi ya maeneo ya Kenya yakihitaji majibu ya haraka, jamii zilizoathiriwa na ukame zinakabiliwa na dharura ya utulivu ambayo inatokea kwa miezi badala ya siku.

English: It reflects the increasing climate variability affecting the country, where excess rainfall and deepening drought occur at the same time.
Kiswahili: Inaonyesha mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa yanayoongezeka yanayoathiri nchi, ambapo mvua nyingi na ukame unaoongezeka hutokea kwa wakati mmoja.

English: The IFRC network and its partners have a vital role in responding to these overlapping climate extremes.
Kiswahili: Mtandao wa IFRC na washirika wake wana jukumu muhimu katika kukabiliana na mabadiliko haya ya hali ya hewa yanayoingiliana.

English: Addressing immediate humanitarian needs while strengthening resilience is essential to help communities withstand future shocks.
Kiswahili: Kushughulikia mahitaji ya haraka ya kibinadamu huku ukiimarisha uthabiti ni muhimu ili kusaidia jamii kuhimili mishtuko ya siku zijazo.

English: Under the Federation-wideIFRC Emergency Appeal for Kenya: Complex Emergency, KRCS is delivering a coordinated, multi-sector response combining food assistance, safe water, health and nutrition services, cash, and livelihoods support.
Kiswahili: Chini ya Rufaa ya Dharura ya Shirikisho la Kimataifa la IFRC kwa Kenya: Dharura Changamano, KRCS inatoa mwitikio ulioratibiwa, wa sekta mbalimbali unaochanganya usaidizi wa chakula, maji salama, huduma za afya na lishe, pesa taslimu na usaidizi wa kujikimu kimaisha.

English: This builds on early action and interventions supported by IFRC’sDisaster Response Emergency Fund, which was activated as conditions deteriorated from late 2024 into 2025 and enabled rapid, targeted scale-up of the crisis response.
Kiswahili: Hili linatokana na hatua za mapema na uingiliaji kati unaoungwa mkono na Hazina ya Dharura ya Kukabiliana na Maafa ya IFRC, ambayo ilianzishwa huku hali zikiendelea kuzorota kutoka mwishoni mwa 2024 hadi 2025 na kuwezesha uongezaji wa haraka, uliolengwa wa mwitikio wa janga.

English: The approach integrates emergency response, early action, and resilience-building through community-led, multi-sectoral interventions tailored to local needs.
Kiswahili: Mtazamo huu unajumuisha mwitikio wa dharura, hatua za mapema, na kujenga uthabiti kupitia uingiliaji kati unaoongozwa na jamii, wa sekta mbalimbali unaolenga mahitaji ya ndani.

English: KRCS has prioritized access to safe and clean water through a combination of emergency water trucking, rehabilitation of strategic water points such as borehole solarization and establishment of function water kiosks and livestock watering points.
Kiswahili: KRCS imeweka kipaumbele cha upatikanaji wa maji salama na safi kupitia mchanganyiko wa lori la dharura la maji, ukarabati wa vituo vya kimkakati vya maji kama vile uwekaji jua wa visima na uanzishwaji wa vioski vya kufanyia kazi na vituo vya kunyweshea mifugo.

English: To date, the KRCS national drought portfolio reports63,024 peoplehave been supported with safe water alongside hygiene promotion through provision of water treatment chemicals such as PUR and aqua tabs.
Kiswahili: Kufikia sasa, ripoti ya jalada la kitaifa la ukame la KRCS linaripoti watu 63,024 wamesaidiwa na maji salama pamoja na uhamasishaji wa usafi kupitia utoaji wa kemikali za kutibu maji kama vile PUR na vichupo vya majini.

English: Field updates fromMandera countyillustrate this integrated approach: after mass livestock deaths were recorded inRhamu(Chabii Barr), KRCS rapidly delivered28,000 litresof safe water alongside medical outreach for vulnerable households.
Kiswahili: Taarifa za uga kutoka kaunti ya Mandera zinaonyesha mbinu hii iliyounganishwa: baada ya vifo vingi vya mifugo kurekodiwa katika Rhamu(Chabii Barr), KRCS iliwasilisha kwa haraka lita 28,000 za maji salama pamoja na huduma za matibabu kwa kaya zilizo hatarini.

English: In area where markets are not feasible, weak or inaccessible, KRCS is doing thein-kind food distribution and supporting livestock protectionthrough animal feeding supplements, veterinary outreach and strategic water access.
Kiswahili: Katika eneo ambalo masoko hayawezekani, dhaifu au hayapatikani, KRCS inafanya usambazaji wa chakula cha asili na kusaidia ulinzi wa mifugo kupitia virutubisho vya kulisha mifugo, ufikiaji wa mifugo na upatikanaji wa maji wa kimkakati.

English: Complementary school foodinterventions are helping maintain school attendance and protection of child nutrition in drought affected areas.
Kiswahili: Afua za ziada za chakula shuleni zinasaidia kudumisha mahudhurio ya shule na ulinzi wa lishe ya watoto katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame.

English: InMarsabit county(North Horr), KRCS reports reaching5,200+ householdsthrough such integrated packages, including targeted feed support alongside emergency water and food, an approach designed to stabilize incomes and prevent deeper asset loss while broader conditions remain crisis‑level.
Kiswahili: Kaunti ya InMarsabit(North Horr), KRCS inaripoti kufikia kaya 5,200+ kupitia vifurushi hivyo vilivyounganishwa, ikiwa ni pamoja na usaidizi unaolengwa wa malisho pamoja na maji na chakula cha dharura, mbinu iliyobuniwa kuleta utulivu wa mapato na kuzuia upotevu mkubwa wa mali huku hali pana zikisalia kuwa kiwango cha mgogoro.

English: InMandera North(Ashabito/Guticha/Morothile), an IFRC‑supported KRCS intervention reached 4,987 households with a combined package of emergency water, CSB++ distributions and health–nutrition services.
Kiswahili: Katika Mandera Kaskazini(Ashabito/Guticha/Morothile), uingiliaji kati wa KRCS unaoungwa mkono na IFRC ulifikia kaya 4,987 zikiwa na kifurushi cha pamoja cha maji ya dharura, usambazaji wa CSB++ na huduma za afya-lishe.

English: InTurkanaandBaringo counties, KRCS supported 20 schools with fortified porridge as part of a school‑based safety net that reached about6,120 childrenfor one term together with their parents, coordinated through the County Steering Group to avoid duplication.
Kiswahili: Katika kaunti za Turkana na Baringo, KRCS ilisaidia shule 20 kwa uji ulioimarishwa kama sehemu ya mtandao wa usalama shuleni ambao ulifikia watoto wapatao 6,120 kwa muhula mmoja pamoja na wazazi wao, ulioratibiwa kupitia Kikundi cha Uendeshaji cha Kaunti ili kuepuka kurudiwa.

English: In total, KRCS reports42,058 children under five provided with nutrition servicesto date under this drought response.
Kiswahili: Kwa jumla, KRCS inaripoti watoto 42,058 walio chini ya miaka mitano waliopewa huduma za lishe hadi sasa chini ya mwitikio huu wa ukame.

English: Where markets are functioning, KRCS is scaling unconditional cash transfer modality to enhance household purchasing power and dignity.
Kiswahili: Ambapo masoko yanafanya kazi, KRCS inaongeza mbinu ya uhawilishaji pesa bila masharti ili kuimarisha uwezo na heshima ya ununuzi wa kaya.

English: Cash and voucher assistance are coordinate through the County Steering groups and aligned with the Kenya Cash Working group guidance to avoid duplication and maximize on the impact.
Kiswahili: Usaidizi wa pesa taslimu na vocha huratibiwa kupitia vikundi vya Uendeshaji vya Kaunti na kuunganishwa na mwongozo wa kikundi cha Kenya Cash Working ili kuepuka kurudia na kuongeza athari.

English: To date,5,400 householdshave received emergency cash transfers under the drought portfolio.
Kiswahili: Kufikia sasa, kaya 5,400 za kunyoa zilipokea uhamishaji wa pesa za dharura chini ya jalada la ukame.

English: A recent example isTurkana county, where KRCS working with the County Steering Group and supported by Danish Red Cross registered2,000 vulnerable familiesfor cash while supporting 10 schools with food; the intervention was explicitly mapped against other partners to prevent overlap and close priority gaps.
Kiswahili: Mfano wa hivi majuzi ni kaunti ya Turkana, ambapo KRCS ikifanya kazi na Kikundi cha Uendeshaji cha Kaunti na kusaidiwa na Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Denmark ilisajili familia 2,000 zilizo hatarini kwa pesa taslimu huku ikisaidia shule 10 kwa chakula; uingiliaji kati ulichorwa kwa uwazi dhidi ya washirika wengine ili kuzuia mwingiliano na kuziba mapengo ya kipaumbele.

English: Between 2020 and 2024, Wajir and Mandera counties faced increased displacement due to prolonged droughts and subsequent flooding.
Kiswahili: Kati ya 2020 na 2024, kaunti za Wajir na Mandera zilikabiliwa na ongezeko la watu waliohama kutokana na ukame wa muda mrefu na mafuriko yaliyofuata.

English: Five consecutive failed rainy seasons devastated pastoralist livelihoods, forcing thousands of households to migrate in search of food, water, and shelter.
Kiswahili: Misimu mitano ya mvua iliyoshindwa mfululizo iliharibu maisha ya wafugaji, na kuwalazimu maelfu ya kaya kuhama kutafuta chakula, maji na makazi.

English: In 2024, the March-April-May (MAM) rains brought extreme floods, further displacing communities.
Kiswahili: Mnamo mwaka wa 2024, mvua za Machi-Aprili-Mei (MAM) zilileta mafuriko makubwa, na kusababisha watu kupoteza makazi zaidi.

English: The Kenya National Drought Management Authority (NDMA) classified both counties among the hardest-hit regions in Kenya, with severe food and water shortages exacerbating the crisis.
Kiswahili: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Kukabiliana na Ukame nchini (NDMA) iliainisha kaunti zote mbili miongoni mwa mikoa iliyoathirika zaidi nchini Kenya, huku uhaba mkubwa wa chakula na maji ukizidisha mgogoro huo.

English: The Solutions and Mobility Index (SMI) for Wajir and Mandera aims to assess progress toward durable solutions for displaced populations (IDPs and IDP returnees).
Kiswahili: Kielezo cha Suluhu na Uhamaji (SMI) cha Wajir na Mandera kinalenga kutathmini maendeleo kuelekea suluhu za kudumu kwa watu waliohamishwa makazi yao (IDPs na wanaorejea IDP).

English: Displacement in these counties is complex, influenced by natural hazards such as drought or floods, insecurity, and resource scarcity.
Kiswahili: Uhamisho wa watu katika kaunti hizi ni changamano, unachangiwa na majanga ya asili kama vile ukame au mafuriko, ukosefu wa usalama na uhaba wa rasilimali.

English: By analyzing access to essential services, livelihoods, and social cohesion, the SMI identifies gaps in recovery efforts and informs targeted interventions.
Kiswahili: Kwa kuchanganua ufikiaji wa huduma muhimu, riziki, na uwiano wa kijamii, SMI inatambua mapungufu katika juhudi za kurejesha na kuarifu afua zinazolengwa.

English: The indicators for SMI align with the Inter-Agency Standing Committee’s (IASC) Framework for Durable Solutions and integrates data from IOM’s Displacement Tracking Matrix (DTM) to ensure a comprehensive, evidence-based approach.
Kiswahili: Viashirio vya SMI vinapatana na Mfumo wa Kamati ya Kudumu ya Wakala baina ya Mashirika (IASC) kwa Masuluhisho ya Kudumu na kuunganisha data kutoka kwa Mfumo wa Ufuatiliaji wa Uhamisho wa IOM (DTM) ili kuhakikisha mbinu ya kina, inayozingatia ushahidi.

English: The arid and semi-arid lands (ASAL) of northern Kenya, particularly the counties of Marsabit, Mandera, Wajir, Turkana, and Garissa, continue to experience multidimensional humanitarian needs driven by the intersection of climatic shocks, chronic vulnerability, and socio-economic marginalization.
Kiswahili: Ardhi kame na nusu kame (ASAL) kaskazini mwa Kenya, haswa kaunti za Marsabit, Mandera, Wajir, Turkana na Garissa, zinaendelea kupata mahitaji ya kibinadamu ya pande nyingi zinazoendeshwa na makutano ya majanga ya hali ya hewa, mazingira magumu sugu, na kutengwa kwa kijamii na kiuchumi.

English: According to the Integrated Food Security Phase Classification, food insecurity remains a defining feature of vulnerability across ASAL counties.
Kiswahili: Kulingana na Ainisho Jumuishi la Awamu ya Usalama wa Chakula, uhaba wa chakula unasalia kuwa kipengele bainifu cha hatari katika kaunti zote za ASAL.

English: In this context, the humanitarian situation in northern Kenya has become increasingly dynamic due to the overlapping impacts of drought and flooding.
Kiswahili: Katika muktadha huu, hali ya kibinadamu kaskazini mwa Kenya imezidi kubadilika kutokana na athari zinazoingiliana za ukame na mafuriko.

English: The refugee-hosting areas, such as Dadaab refugee camp in Garissa County, Kakuma refugee camp and Kalobeyei Integrated Settlement in Turkana County, where humanitarian conditions continue to evolve amid funding constraints and policy transitions.
Kiswahili: Maeneo yanayohifadhi wakimbizi, kama vile kambi ya wakimbizi ya Dadaab katika Kaunti ya Garissa, kambi ya wakimbizi ya Kakuma na Makazi Jumuishi ya Kalobeyei katika Kaunti ya Turkana, ambapo hali ya kibinadamu inaendelea kubadilika huku kukiwa na vikwazo vya ufadhili na mabadiliko ya sera.

English: Recent reductions in humanitarian assistance, including food ration cuts and differentiated assistance approaches based on household vulnerability status, are likely to have significant implications for food consumption, indebtedness, coping strategies, social cohesion, and overall household well-being.
Kiswahili: Kupungua kwa hivi majuzi kwa usaidizi wa kibinadamu, ikiwa ni pamoja na kupunguzwa kwa mgao wa chakula na mbinu tofauti za usaidizi kulingana na hali ya hatari ya kaya, kuna uwezekano wa kuwa na athari kubwa kwa matumizi ya chakula, madeni, mikakati ya kukabiliana, uwiano wa kijamii, na ustawi wa kaya kwa ujumla.

English: During the design phase, REACH consulted with a range of humanitarian and government stakeholders to contextualize the assessment and avoid duplicating existing data collection efforts.
Kiswahili: Wakati wa awamu ya usanifu, REACH ilishauriana na washikadau mbalimbali wa kibinadamu na serikali ili kuweka muktadha wa tathmini na kuepuka kunakili juhudi zilizopo za kukusanya data.

English: This involved discussions through the NGO Refugee Group (NRG), OCHA-led sector coordination meetings, engagements with sector focal points, the NDMA, and relevant county government counterparts.
Kiswahili: Hii ilihusisha majadiliano kupitia Kundi la Wakimbizi lisilo la Kiserikali (NRG), mikutano ya uratibu wa sekta inayoongozwa na OCHA, mashirikiano na maeneo muhimu ya kisekta, NDMA, na washirika husika wa serikali ya kaunti.

English: The input gathered through these consultations helped shape indicator selection, geographic prioritization, and alignment with ongoing humanitarian analysis and planning.
Kiswahili: Maoni yaliyokusanywa kupitia mashauriano haya yalisaidia kuunda uteuzi wa viashiria, upendeleo wa kijiografia, na upatanishi na uchambuzi na mipango inayoendelea ya kibinadamu.

English: Against this backdrop, the MSNA seeks to generate comprehensive household-level evidence on the severity, distribution, and drivers of humanitarian needs across food security, nutrition, health, WASH, livelihoods, shelter, education, and protection sectors in Mandera, Wajir, Marsabit, Turkana, and Garissa counties, including refugee camps and settlements.
Kiswahili: Kutokana na hali hii, MSNA inataka kutoa ushahidi wa kina wa ngazi ya kaya kuhusu ukali, usambazaji, na vichochezi vya mahitaji ya kibinadamu katika usalama wa chakula, lishe, afya, WASH, riziki, malazi, elimu, na sekta za ulinzi katika kaunti za Mandera, Wajir, Marsabit, Turkana na Garissa, ikijumuisha kambi za wakimbizi na makazi.

English: The assessment will support humanitarian actors, county governments, and development partners in identifying sectoral and geographic disparities, understanding differences between refugee and host community populations, and informing evidence-based targeting, resource allocation, and multisectoral response planning within Kenya’s evolving humanitarian landscape.
Kiswahili: Tathmini itawasaidia wahusika wa masuala ya kibinadamu, serikali za kaunti, na washirika wa maendeleo katika kutambua tofauti za kisekta na kijiografia, kuelewa tofauti kati ya wakimbizi na jamii zinazowapokea, na kufahamisha ulengaji kulingana na ushahidi, ugawaji wa rasilimali, na upangaji wa mwitikio wa sekta mbalimbali ndani ya mazingira ya Kenya yanayoendelea ya kibinadamu.

English: Heavy rainfall has been affecting a number of counties of Kenya since 21 April, causing rivers to overflow (particularly the Tana river).
Kiswahili: Mvua kubwa imekuwa ikiathiri kaunti kadhaa za Kenya tangu tarehe 21 Aprili, na kusababisha mito kufurika (haswa mto Tana).

English: The resulting floods and landslides have resulted in casualties and widespread damage.
Kiswahili: Mafuriko yaliyotokea na maporomoko ya ardhi yamesababisha hasara na uharibifu mkubwa.

English: The affected counties and regions are Tana River, Mombasa, Kwale, Tharaka Nithi, Elgeyo-Marakwet, Kiambu, Eastern, Central, Coast, Nairobi and Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: Kaunti na maeneo yaliyoathiriwa ni Tana River, Mombasa, Kwale, Tharaka Nithi, Elgeyo-Marakwet, Kiambu, Mashariki, Kati, Pwani, Nairobi na Rift Valley.

English: Media report, as of 4 May, 18 fatalities, of whom nine are in the Eastern region, three in the central region, and two each in Coast, Nairobi and Rift Valley regions.
Kiswahili: Vyombo vya habari viliripoti, kufikia tarehe 4 Mei, vifo 18, kati yao tisa viko katika eneo la Mashariki, vitatu katika eneo la kati, na viwili kila kimoja katika mikoa ya Pwani, Nairobi na Bonde la Ufa.

English: Media also reports several displaced families and damaged infrastructures across the affected areas.
Kiswahili: Vyombo vya habari pia vinaripoti familia kadhaa zilizohamishwa na miundombinu iliyoharibiwa katika maeneo yote yaliyoathiriwa.

English: Over the next 96 hours, more rainfall is still forecast over western, southern and coastal Kenya.
Kiswahili: Katika muda wa saa 96 zijazo, mvua zaidi bado inatabiriwa magharibi, kusini na pwani ya Kenya.

English: The proportion of households with an acceptable Food Consumption Score (FCS) increased from 9% at baseline to 44% at endline, while poor FCS declined from 16% to 7%.
Kiswahili: Idadi ya kaya zilizo na Alama inayokubalika ya Utumiaji wa Chakula (FCS) iliongezeka kutoka 9% kwa msingi hadi 44% wakati wa mwisho, wakati FCS maskini ilipungua kutoka 16% hadi 7%.

English: Employment of high coping strategies dropped from 38% to 9%, and severe livelihood coping also decreased, suggesting that the cash assistance contributed to improved food access and reduced reliance on coping strategies.
Kiswahili: Uajiri wa mikakati ya kukabiliana na hali ya juu ulishuka kutoka 38% hadi 9%, na hali ngumu ya maisha pia ilipungua, na kupendekeza kuwa msaada wa pesa ulichangia kuboresha upatikanaji wa chakula na kupunguza utegemezi wa mikakati ya kukabiliana.

English: Nearly all households (99%) reported being affected by drought, with significant water and hygiene needs reported.
Kiswahili: Takriban kaya zote (99%) ziliripoti kuathiriwa na ukame, huku mahitaji makubwa ya maji na usafi yakiripotiwa.

English: Fragile and displacement-affected settings face interconnected pressures of environmental degradation, climate shocks, resource scarcity and social tensions.
Kiswahili: Mipangilio dhaifu na inayoathiriwa na uhamishaji inakabiliwa na shinikizo zilizounganishwa za uharibifu wa mazingira, majanga ya hali ya hewa, uhaba wa rasilimali na mivutano ya kijamii.

English: Refugee and host communities often experience limited livelihood opportunities, while competition over water, energy, forests and land intensifies environmental stress and weakens social cohesion.
Kiswahili: Wakimbizi na jumuiya zinazowapokea mara nyingi hupata fursa ndogo za kujikimu, wakati ushindani juu ya maji, nishati, misitu na ardhi huzidisha dhiki ya mazingira na kudhoofisha mshikamano wa kijamii.

English: C-PEACE works with refugees, host communities, governments and humanitarian agencies, including UNHCR and UN-Habitat, to co-design inclusive circular livelihood models that contribute to resilience and peacebuilding.
Kiswahili: C-PEACE inafanya kazi na wakimbizi, jumuiya zinazowapokea, serikali na mashirika ya misaada ya kibinadamu, ikiwa ni pamoja na UNHCR na UN-Habitat, ili kuunda miundo ya maisha ya duara inayojumuisha ustahimilivu na kujenga amani.

English: It positions refugees and host communities as agents of environmental restoration rather than burdens on local resources.
Kiswahili: Inawaweka wakimbizi na jumuiya zinazowahifadhi kama mawakala wa urejeshaji wa mazingira badala ya mizigo kwenye rasilimali za ndani.

English: Implemented through strong local partnerships, this work directly contributes to the 2030 CGIAR outcomes by enhancing the resilience, self-reliance and social cohesion of displacement affected communities.
Kiswahili: Ikitekelezwa kupitia ushirikiano dhabiti wa ndani, kazi hii inachangia moja kwa moja matokeo ya CGIAR ya 2030 kwa kuimarisha uthabiti, kujitegemea na mshikamano wa kijamii wa jamii zilizoathirika.

English: Building on this foundation, C-PEACE applies an integrated approach to deliver environmental, livelihood and peacebuilding outcomes in fragile settings.
Kiswahili: Kwa kuzingatia msingi huu, C-PEACE inatumia mbinu jumuishi ili kutoa matokeo ya kimazingira, maisha na kujenga amani katika mazingira tete.

English: This is due to the enhanced trade links between Kampala and different major cities in Kenya and the high-volume cross-border movement.
Kiswahili: Hii ni kutokana na kuimarishwa kwa uhusiano wa kibiashara kati ya Kampala na miji mikuu tofauti nchini Kenya na harakati za juu za kuvuka mpaka.

English: The case, a 29-yearold male truck driver, Kenyan national and a resident of Zambia was said to have visited St.
Kiswahili: Kesi hiyo, dereva wa lori wa kiume mwenye umri wa miaka 29, raia wa Kenya na mkazi wa Zambia inasemekana alitembelea St.

English: The county department of health – Uasin Gishu, however, dismissed the rumor through public notice as false.
Kiswahili: Idara ya afya ya kaunti - Uasin Gishu, hata hivyo, ilipuuza uvumi huo kupitia notisi ya umma kuwa ya uwongo.

English: Nevertheless, follow up was initiated, samples collected and tested for Bundibugyo virus disease (BVD) with results turning negative.
Kiswahili: Hata hivyo, ufuatiliaji ulianzishwa, sampuli zilikusanywa na kupimwa kwa ugonjwa wa virusi vya Bundibugyo (BVD) na matokeo yakabadilika kuwa hasi.

English: Fortunately, all the tests have turned negative.
Kiswahili: Kwa bahati nzuri, vipimo vyote vimegeuka kuwa hasi.

English: Between intense droughts and sporadic floods, much of Kenya faces recurring or seemingly never-ending disasters.
Kiswahili: Kati ya ukame mkali na mafuriko ya hapa na pale, sehemu kubwa ya Kenya inakabiliwa na majanga ya mara kwa mara au yanayoonekana kutoisha.

English: People’s vulnerability is closely connected to structural inequalities in the country, where people in areas defined as arid and semi-arid lands (ASALs) suffer from lack of government services, investment and economic opportunities, with wealth concentrated in the capital, Nairobi.
Kiswahili: Athari za watu zinahusiana kwa karibu na ukosefu wa usawa wa kimuundo nchini, ambapo watu katika maeneo yanayofafanuliwa kama ardhi kame na nusu kame (ASALs) wanakabiliwa na ukosefu wa huduma za serikali, uwekezaji na fursa za kiuchumi, huku utajiri ukiwa umejilimbikizia mji mkuu, Nairobi.

English: The ASAL Humanitarian Network (AHN) was formed to collectively address immediate humanitarian needs and the drivers of crises, including a significant focus on ensuring the state takes on greater crisis response leadership.
Kiswahili: Mtandao wa Kibinadamu wa ASAL (AHN) uliundwa ili kushughulikia kwa pamoja mahitaji ya haraka ya kibinadamu na vichochezi vya migogoro, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuzingatia kwa kiasi kikubwa kuhakikisha kuwa serikali inachukua uongozi mkubwa wa kukabiliana na mgogoro.

English: This article examines how such aspirations play out in practice, focusing on two AHN responses, to a recent flood and ongoing drought.
Kiswahili: Makala haya yanachunguza jinsi matarajio kama haya yanavyotekelezwa, kwa kuzingatia majibu mawili ya AHN, kwa mafuriko ya hivi karibuni na ukame unaoendelea.

English: Hosting nearly half of Africa’s migrants, the East and Horn of Africa offers key corridors and major transit points for human mobility.
Kiswahili: Likipokea karibu nusu ya wahamiaji wa Afrika, Mashariki na Pembe ya Afrika inatoa korido muhimu na sehemu kuu za kupita kwa uhamaji wa binadamu.

English: Within East Africa, Kenya is a country of origin, transit, and destination for people on the move, with Nairobi serving as the capital and economic hub of the country.
Kiswahili: Ndani ya Afrika Mashariki, Kenya ni nchi ya asili, usafiri, na marudio ya watu wanaohama, huku Nairobi ikitumika kama mji mkuu na kitovu cha uchumi wa nchi.

English: This Local Manufacturing Strategy is structured to position Kenya’s healthcare as an investment for social impact, equity, economic growth, commercial traction, and sustainability.
Kiswahili: Mkakati huu wa Uzalishaji wa Ndani umeundwa ili kuweka huduma ya afya ya Kenya kama kitega uchumi cha athari za kijamii, usawa, ukuaji wa uchumi, kuvutia kibiashara na uendelevu.

English: As a catalyst for self-reliance and health security, the strategy advances Kenya’s strategic interests regionally, riding on the goodwill of the President’s lead role as AU champion on Local Manufacturing.
Kiswahili: Kama kichocheo cha kujitegemea na usalama wa afya, mkakati huo unakuza masilahi ya kimkakati ya Kenya kieneo, ukiegemea nia njema ya jukumu kuu la Rais kama bingwa wa AU katika Utengenezaji wa Ndani.

English: Key insights from the landscape analysis indicate a fragmented local manufacturing ecosystem with cross-cutting challenges that span multiple ministries and agencies, limiting progress toward Universal Health Coverage.
Kiswahili: Maoni muhimu kutoka kwa uchanganuzi wa mazingira yanaonyesha mfumo ikolojia wa utengenezaji wa ndani uliogawanyika na changamoto mtambuka ambazo zinahusisha wizara na mashirika mengi, na hivyo kuzuia maendeleo kuelekea Huduma ya Afya kwa Wote.

English: The sector remains siloed across supply chain, research, regulation, trade, product development, financing, human capital, and health data systems, resulting in persistent vulnerability to import and donor dependency, geopolitical disruptions, and climate-related health threats.
Kiswahili: Sekta hii inasalia kuwa chini ya ugavi, utafiti, udhibiti, biashara, ukuzaji wa bidhaa, ufadhili, rasilimali watu, na mifumo ya data ya afya, na kusababisha hatari ya kudumu ya kuagiza na kutegemea wafadhili, usumbufu wa kijiografia, na matishio ya kiafya yanayohusiana na hali ya hewa.

English: Key imperatives include strengthening private sector-led Pharmaceutical Value Chain Level 3 manufacturing (final dosage/fill-finish), where a few manufacturers account for most local production, through enhanced government–private sector collaboration to align commercial sustainability with national socio-economic goals.
Kiswahili: Masharti muhimu ni pamoja na kuimarisha kiwango cha 3 cha Mnyororo wa Thamani wa Dawa unaoongozwa na sekta binafsi (kipimo cha mwisho/kumaliza kumaliza), ambapo wazalishaji wachache wanachangia uzalishaji mwingi wa ndani, kupitia ushirikiano ulioimarishwa wa serikali na sekta binafsi ili kuoanisha uendelevu wa kibiashara na malengo ya kitaifa ya kijamii na kiuchumi.

English: The strategy also emphasizes commercialization of locally manufactured vaccines through Kenya Biovax, contingent on PPB achieving ML-3 status.
Kiswahili: Mkakati huo pia unasisitiza ufanyaji biashara wa chanjo zinazotengenezwa nchini kupitia Kenya Biovax, ikitegemea PPB kupata hadhi ya ML-3.

English: Additional priorities include developing underexploited Pharmaceutical Value Chain Level 4 (API production) and Level 5 (R&D), which require advanced technology, specialized skills, and significant investment despite available government incentives.
Kiswahili: Vipaumbele vya ziada ni pamoja na kuendeleza Kiwango cha 4 cha Mnyororo wa Thamani ya Dawa (uzalishaji wa API) na Kiwango cha 5 (R&D), ambacho kinahitaji teknolojia ya hali ya juu, ujuzi maalum na uwekezaji mkubwa licha ya motisha zinazopatikana za serikali.

English: This further highlights the need for regional API supply-chain collaboration across Africa and calls for a dedicated strategy to strengthen the largely under-prioritized diagnostics and medical devices sector.
Kiswahili: Hii inaangazia zaidi hitaji la ushirikiano wa kikanda wa ugavi wa API kote barani Afrika na kutoa wito wa mkakati mahususi wa kuimarisha sekta ya uchunguzi na vifaa vya matibabu ambayo haijapewa kipaumbele kwa kiasi kikubwa.

English: Pivoting on three (3) strategic pillars i.e.
Kiswahili: Kuegemea kwenye nguzo tatu (3) za kimkakati i.e.

English: It also aims to demystify negative perspectives on LM industry’s unattractiveness for sustainable finance, by prioritizing and navigating complex regulatory environment, technology partnership, and building replicable operational models that meet international compliance standards.
Kiswahili: Pia inalenga kufifisha mitazamo hasi kuhusu kutovutia kwa sekta ya LM kwa fedha endelevu, kwa kuweka kipaumbele na kuabiri mazingira changamano ya udhibiti, ushirikiano wa teknolojia, na kujenga miundo ya utendakazi inayoweza kuigwa ambayo inakidhi viwango vya utiifu wa kimataifa.

English: This will de-risk the LM investment landscape and attract capital needed for infrastructure upgrades and foster private sector-led growth for supply stability, health security, and a future of shared prosperity for Kenya and Africa.
Kiswahili: Hii itaondoa hatari ya mazingira ya uwekezaji ya LM na kuvutia mtaji unaohitajika kwa ajili ya uboreshaji wa miundombinu na kukuza ukuaji unaoongozwa na sekta ya kibinafsi kwa utulivu wa usambazaji, usalama wa afya, na mustakabali wa ustawi wa pamoja kwa Kenya na Afrika.

English: One protracted Grade 2 emergency (Mpox, Clade 1b) and several other priority events are ongoing, including measles outbreaks in three counties, widespread flooding from the MAM long rains, and a severe food security and nutrition crisis in arid and semi-arid (ASAL) counties.
Kiswahili: Moja ya dharura ya muda mrefu ya darasa la 2 (Mpox, Clade 1b) na matukio mengine kadhaa ya kipaumbele yanaendelea, ikiwa ni pamoja na milipuko ya surua katika kaunti tatu, mafuriko yaliyoenea kutokana na mvua ndefu za MAM, na shida kubwa ya usalama wa chakula na lishe katika kaunti kame na nusu kame (ASAL).

English: Mobile health services in Kenya reduce the risk of stillbirths
Kiswahili: Huduma za afya kwa njia ya simu nchini Kenya hupunguza hatari ya watoto kuzaliwa wakiwa wamekufa

English: Kenya MVD Readiness - DREF Final Report (MDRKE069)
Kiswahili: Utayari wa MVD ya Kenya - Ripoti ya Mwisho ya DREF (MDRKE069)

English: Canada strengthens humanitarian and economic partnerships during Secretary of State Sarai’s visit to Kenya
Kiswahili: Kanada inaimarisha ushirikiano wa kibinadamu na kiuchumi wakati wa ziara ya Waziri wa Mambo ya Nje Sarai nchini Kenya

English: As drought tightens its grip on northern Kenya, a new IPC report confirms the crisis is getting significantly worse
Kiswahili: Wakati ukame unavyozidi kushika kasi kaskazini mwa Kenya, ripoti mpya ya IPC inathibitisha kuwa mzozo unazidi kuwa mbaya zaidi.

English: Kenya Population Movement - DREF Final Report (MDRKE067)
Kiswahili: Harakati za Idadi ya Watu Kenya - Ripoti ya Mwisho ya DREF (MDRKE067)

English: Kenya Flood and Cholera Outbreak 2025 - DREF Final Report (MDRKE066)
Kiswahili: Mlipuko wa Mafuriko na Kipindupindu Kenya 2025 - Ripoti ya Mwisho ya DREF (MDRKE066)

English: Urgent: 3.3 Million Kenyans face acute hunger as multi-year drought devastates ASAL counties: Urgent multisectoral action needed to save lives
Kiswahili: Haraka: Wakenya Milioni 3.3 wanakabiliwa na njaa kali huku ukame wa miaka mingi ukiharibu kaunti za ASAL: Hatua za haraka za sekta mbalimbali zinahitajika kuokoa maisha

English: Kenya Drought - DREF Final Report (MDRKE065)
Kiswahili: Ukame wa Kenya - Ripoti ya Mwisho ya DREF (MDRKE065)

English: Resettlement in Dadaab enables hundreds of refugee families to access services after years
Kiswahili: Makazi mapya katika Dadaab huwezesha mamia ya familia za wakimbizi kupata huduma baada ya miaka mingi

English: Water and land use systems and natural resources management in the multifunctional landscapes of Western Kenya
Kiswahili: Mifumo ya matumizi ya maji na ardhi na usimamizi wa maliasili katika mandhari mbalimbali za Magharibi mwa Kenya

English: Noncommunicable diseases and mental health in the WHO African Region progress report 2024
Kiswahili: Magonjwa yasiyoambukiza na afya ya akili katika ripoti ya maendeleo ya WHO Kanda ya Afrika 2024

English: Kenya, Africa | El Niño Floods 2023-24 - Final Report (MDRKE058)
Kiswahili: Kenya, Afrika | Mafuriko ya El Niño 2023-24 - Ripoti ya Mwisho (MDRKE058)

English: MSF: Test and treat approach: How communities lead in malaria treatment

Kiswahili: HAZINA YA TAIFA YAANZISHA MAPITO YA UHASIBU WA MSINGI UTAYARISHAJI Hazina ya Kitaifa inafuraha kutangaza kuanza kwa mageuzi kutoka kwa uhasibu wa msingi wa fedha kwenda kwa viwango vya kimataifa vya uhasibu katika sekta ya umma (IPSAS), kuashiria hatua muhimu katika mageuzi ya usimamizi wa fedha za umma.

English: This transition will affect the National Government, County Governments, and their respective entities, ensuring greater transparency and accountability in financial reporting.
Kiswahili: Mpito huu utaathiri Serikali ya Kitaifa, Serikali za Kaunti, na huluki zao, kuhakikisha uwazi na uwajibikaji zaidi katika kuripoti fedha.

English: The Cabinet approved this transition on 7 thMarch,2024 following recommendations from the National Treasury and the Publi c Sector Accounting Standards Board (PSASB).
Kiswahili: Baraza la Mawaziri liliidhinisha mabadiliko haya tarehe 7 Machi, 2024 kufuatia mapendekezo kutoka kwa Hazina ya Kitaifa na Bodi ya Viwango vya Uhasibu katika Sekta ya Umma (PSASB).

English: Section 23 (1) of the Wildlife Conservation and Management Act, 2013 (as amended) establishes the Wildlife Conservation Trust Fund.
Kiswahili: Kifungu cha 23 (1) cha Sheria ya Uhifadhi na Usimamizi wa Wanyamapori, 2013 (kama ilivyorekebishwa) kinaanzisha Mfuko wa Udhamini wa Uhifadhi wa Wanyamapori.

English: The Board of the Wildlife Conservation Trust Fund and the National Treasury have now finalized the draft Public Finance Management (Wildlife Conservation Trust Fund) Regulations, 2024.
Kiswahili: Bodi ya Mfuko wa Hifadhi ya Wanyamapori na Hazina ya Kitaifa sasa imekamilisha rasimu ya Kanuni za Usimamizi wa Fedha za Umma (Wildlife Conservation Trust Fund) za mwaka 2024.

English: These Regulations may be cited as the Sports, Arts and Social Development Fund (Amendment) Regulations, 2024.
Kiswahili: Kanuni hizi zinaweza kutajwa kuwa Kanuni za Mfuko wa Michezo, Sanaa na Maendeleo ya Jamii (Marekebisho) za 2024.

English: Regulation 1 of the Public Finance Management (Sports, Arts and Social Development Fund) Regulations, 2018 , hereinafter referred to as the “principal Regulations” is amended by deleting the words “Arts and Social Development” appearing immediately after the word “Sports” and substituting therefor the words “and Arts”. 3.

English: The Policy is underpinned on the Government’s commitment to address the challenges that have faced the Kenyan tax system for a long time.
Kiswahili: Sera hiyo inaungwa mkono na kujitolea kwa Serikali kushughulikia changamoto ambazo zimekabili mfumo wa ushuru wa Kenya kwa muda mrefu.

English: As such this National Tax Policy identifies and analyses the challenges of the current tax regime and sets out broad policy guidelines to address these challenges thereby forming a basis for tax reforms and review of existing tax legislation.
Kiswahili: Kwa hivyo Sera hii ya Kitaifa ya Ushuru inabainisha na kuchambua changamoto za mfumo wa sasa wa kodi na kuweka miongozo mipana ya sera ili kutatua changamoto hizi na hivyo kutengeneza msingi wa marekebisho ya kodi na mapitio ya sheria zilizopo za kodi.

English: Alternatively, persons may submit written memoranda in hard copies, in the format provided for in the National Treasury website, addressed to the Principal Secretary, National Treasury, P .O.
Kiswahili: Vinginevyo, watu wanaweza kuwasilisha memoranda zilizoandikwa katika nakala ngumu, katika muundo uliotolewa katika tovuti ya Hazina ya Kitaifa, iliyotumwa kwa Katibu Mkuu, Hazina ya Kitaifa, P.O.
